/usr/bin/ar qc libVulkanEngine.a CMakeFiles/VulkanEngine.dir/src/app.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VulkanEngine.dir/src/buffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VulkanEngine.dir/src/camera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VulkanEngine.dir/src/descriptors.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VulkanEngine.dir/src/device.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VulkanEngine.dir/src/game_object.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VulkanEngine.dir/src/keyboard_movement_controller.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VulkanEngine.dir/src/model.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VulkanEngine.dir/src/pipeline.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VulkanEngine.dir/src/renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VulkanEngine.dir/src/simple_render_system.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VulkanEngine.dir/src/swap_chain.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VulkanEngine.dir/src/window.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libVulkanEngine.a
